title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a music streaming service designed for focus and productivity during thinking and building work. The playlists are made and curated by musicians.
writeup: Claude FM is a music streaming service built for focus during thinking and building work, with playlists made and curated by musicians. The video positions it as a tool for sustaining concentration across productive sessions. The takeaway: the offering centers on human-curated playlists aimed specifically at focus and productivity.
